channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: TON Surges 36% as Telegram ‘Replaces’ TON Foundation
item.description: Toncoin has jumped on Pavel Durov's pledge to slash fees to near-zero, with TON meme coins piling on gains of up to 150%.

item.title: One bank after another scraps Fed rate-cut forecasts. Bitcoin doesn't care.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 5, 2026

item.title: Ripple to Share North Korean Threat Intelligence With Crypto Industry
item.description: The move follows two nine-figure exploits of DeFi protocols Drift and KelpDAO in April, as DPRK hackers shift to social engineering tactics.

item.title: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms
item.description: Innovation City launches a blockchain-based business ID system, giving more than 1,000 firms verifiable onchain credentials for identity and access.

item.title: Telegram to become TON’s largest validator, Durov says
item.description: Toncoin rose 33.8% after Pavel Durov said Telegram would deepen its role in TON, while details on the foundation and validator structure remain unclear.

item.title: Crypto platform Bullish to buy Equiniti for $4.2 billion, building tokenized securities infrastructure
item.description: The deal brings a regulated transfer agent into the Bullish stack, expanding the firm's end-to-end tokenization capabilities.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $80,000 as altcoins rally and risk appetite returns
item.description: Crypto markets climb Tuesday with BTC above $80,000, altcoins gaining momentum, and investors rotating into higher-risk plays amid improving sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $532M as BTC reclaims $80K amid ‘post-ceasefire recovery’
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs pulled in over $532 million on Monday as BTC surged past $80,000 amid improved risk sentiment following the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: DeFi lender Aave asks court to block $71 million crypto seizure tied to North Korea claims
item.description: The filing challenges a New York restraining notice that froze ETH on Arbitrum after the rsETH exploit, with Aave arguing the funds belong to users, not North Korea judgment creditors

item.title: Stablecoin proposal still ‘falls short’ of protecting bank deposits: US banks
item.description: US Senator Thom Tillis said the current text of the CLARITY Act offers a compromise for the crypto industry and banks and provides a bipartisan path for the bill’s passage.

item.title: Bitcoin used to hate inflation. Now it might be the opposite
item.description: Bitcoin is rallying alongside inflation signals, defying the traditional macro playbook.

item.title: Ripple to share North Korean threat intelligence with crypto firms
item.description: Ripple said April's $285 million Drift breach revealed a new pattern of long-cycle social engineering replacing traditional smart contract exploits.

item.title: Haun Ventures raises $1B, adding AI to crypto focus
item.description: Haun Ventures founder Katie Haun said AI will “increasingly begin to conduct economic activity on our behalf," and services will need to adapt for that world.

item.title: Polygon rolls out private stablecoin payments targeting institutions
item.description: The new wallet feature hides senders, receivers and amounts onchain while maintaining compliance through know your transaction screening and auditable files.

item.title: Bitcoin crosses $81,000, ETH, SOL, DOGE steady as options desks bid on further price jump
item.description: Bitcoin is back above $80,000 after Monday's brief reversal on the disputed Iran missile claim, with options markets quietly setting up for a breakout even as skew still favors downside protection.

item.title: XRP slips below $1.40 on heavy volume, tightening range puts breakout in focus
item.description: High-volume breakdown reset positioning, but compression between $1.38–$1.44 now points to a larger move.

item.title: Polygon Wallet Adds Shielded USDC and USDT Payments Polygon Labs has launched shielded stablecoin payments in its wallet, supporting USDC and USDT. Users can now choose a "Privately Send" option, which routes transfers through Hinkal’s shielded - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1oemNrZjFPRHJ1MmtfWmZYVDJBM1N4d2NZYjJZQmk0UERCR3cwLXJWUVBTZWFRWUNPeVpGU1U4Qy1vdDh6S1hqWXdKcEdqYVpXWnZrenJsd2JoMnh5ZzF0Q3Mxaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Polygon Wallet Adds Shielded USD…

item.title: Russia's Largest Securities Exchange to Launch SOL, XRP, TRX and BNB Crypto Indexes The Moscow Exchange will begin publishing four crypto indexes tracking SOL, XRP, TRX and BNB from May 13, using pricing data from Binance (50%), Bybit (20%), OK - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5WSWZHY0tyalROM2YzRjMtQmsyME5rRHdlNlhraU1Cc1FyU3pNOHB6OXBEZW95WU5BWERIb0FGQXpKa05EZFpnQmZlSXh4Y182R1FaUGpKSmNIbldxb3ctT1lLdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Russia's Largest Securities Exch…

item.title: Aave files emergency motion to lift restraining notice on frozen ETH
item.description: Aave argued that a thief doesn’t gain lawful ownership of property by stealing it and that Gerstein Harrow’s legal argument “defies logic, common sense and the law.”

item.title: 🚨TODAY: CRYPTO STOCKS SURGE AS CLARITY ACT MOMENTUM BUILDS Circle jumped nearly 20% on Monday, leading a broad rally in crypto-related equities as progress on the Clarity Act revived optimism around U.S. digital asset regulation. Coinbase - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBKY1liRXpZeEd4b3JkSVlPTlA2Tkt6eEs3eENoNnFVM2tvd0RwOEhKYmF4V0R1ZGF0anJZV0NFclJYdFFvdzFIT2I1SHU4eDE1UVp4REdHQ0NRekZmd0d3Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨TODAY: CRYPTO STOCKS SURGE AS CLAR…

item.title: Bitcoin tests $80,000 as Asia’s bid fades and Hong Kong AI IPOs surge
item.description: Western desks are carrying the bitcoin rally alone, with Friday’s jobs report the next test.

item.title: Western Union begins USDPT stablecoin rollout on Solana
item.description: Western Union is one of several remittance companies that announced stablecoin plans after the US passed the stablecoin-friendly GENIUS Act in July.

item.title: Bitcoin turns risk on as stocks hit new highs and miner profits rise: Is $85K BTC next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s recent rally to $80,000 amid improving BTC miner and options markets metrics could create a clear path to $85,000.

item.title: World Liberty sues Justin Sun for defamation in WLFI dispute
item.description: World Liberty Financial claimed Sun engaged in defamatory tactics and prohibited token transfers, including shorting the WLFI token and conducting straw sales on behalf of others.

item.title: Someone Built an Open-Source 'Theoretical Mythos' to Reverse-Engineer Anthropic's Most Dangerous AI
item.description: OpenMythos is a from-scratch attempt to reconstruct the architecture behind Claude Mythos, the cyber-capable model Anthropic refuses to release. It's speculation in code form.

item.title: Aave Fights to Unfreeze $71 Million as Kelp DAO Hack Spills Into Court
item.description: A federal case over frozen crypto could determine whether DeFi recovery funds can be seized to satisfy unrelated judgments.

item.title: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants
item.description: With $114 trillion in custodied liquid assets, Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation looks to position tokenization as the future of existing financial system.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: K-Pop Firm's Stock Plunges as It Dumps Bitcoin Treasury Plan for AI Pivot
item.description: K Wave Media is shifting $485 million in funding from its Bitcoin treasury strategy towards an AI infrastructure play.

item.title: Bitcoin short-term cost basis approaches profitability, but $80K must flip to support first
item.description: Crypto markets turned euphoric as BTC traded above $80,000, but a rally through short-term holders’ cost basis is needed to cement the bull trend.

item.title: Haun Ventures Raises $1 Billion Fund for the Intersection of Crypto and AI Agents
item.description: Katie Haun’s venture firm closes a $1 billion fund to target crypto infrastructure and systems for AI agents to transact autonomously.

item.title: DeepClaude Lets You Run Claude Code With DeepSeek's Brain for 17x Cheaper
item.description: A new open-source script swaps Claude Code's expensive Anthropic backend for DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or Fireworks AI—keeping the agent loop, slashing the bill.

item.title: GameStop's $55.5 billion eBay takeover bid puts its $368 million bitcoin stash in the crosshairs
item.description: The video game retailer’s proposed acquisition plan revives question on whether its $368 million bitcoin stash could be sold to fund the expansion.

item.title: "my crypto journey is a lie" - Results on X | Live Posts & Updates - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilAFBVV95cUxORWRpdEx0WUZRNVpNRHNqZmlDWFlkRXhXRHc4eTJ4aHVGbzlIS0hrR0p1aDBFZ3JtNWlwengxWEo1X2QyU1BzbHUxMF9FVmhhQjFkMzhQaUYxS3pZRWpEWFJKUzJyS2RSMTYxQ3otaW1NdEZHVlV0enpOVTlhMGtVOXBhUXA1RTF0R05ya…

item.title: Tether Gold tops $3.3B as demand for bullion-backed tokens rises
item.description: Tether’s XAUt tops $3.3 billion as gold reserves reach 154 tons, with demand rising amid geopolitical tensions and shifting expectations for Federal Reserve policy.

item.title: US Government Says China's Best AI Models Lag Behind. Experts Aren't So Sure
item.description: NIST's CAISI evaluated DeepSeek V4 Pro using private benchmarks and a cost-comparison filter that excluded every US model except GPT-5.4 mini. Critics call the methodology convenient.

item.title: Colorado Lawmakers Move to Replace Contentious AI Law With New Rules
item.description: A new proposed bill aims to ease industry pressure while preserving safeguards for consumers.

item.title: Price predictions 5/4: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin has broken above the $79,500 level, backed by solid buying by institutional investors. Will the altcoins also follow?

item.title: Hut 8 swaps Coinbase loan for cheaper FalconX deal, slashing borrowing costs as it bets big on AI
item.description: A new $200 million, 364-day bitcoin-backed facility replaces the Coinbase Credit arrangement, cutting debt costs by 200 basis points.

item.title: JUST IN: Companies bought 50,351 bitcoin in Q1 this year, the most amount ever 🤯 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9kNEppaldRblVkaU1vVmNTeFd5Q0IxQzA5NXlxd3RySVJkQ2szNmRtQXZtQ0hrTmd6YVVpS2d1ZWpaZWlqU3kxWF92YWl5MFg1ZHlKUmQyYW1oYk5NSkNwQ3M0NkhLSW8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Companies bought 5…

item.title: Banks Stay Tight-Lipped as Senators Reveal Proposed Clarity Act Stablecoin Deal
item.description: Senators unveiled a Clarity Act compromise on the subject of stablecoin rewards. Crypto seems happy enough, but what about the banks?

item.title: Circle, Coinbase lead crypto stocks rally amid Clarity Act progress, bitcoin hitting $80,000
item.description: The market is starting to price in potential winners as stablecoin yield compromise opens path for passing key U.S. digital asset regulation, one analyst said.

item.title: Western Union Launches USDPT Stablecoin on Solana via Anchorage Digital
item.description: Remittance giant Western Union’s USDPT token will power cross-border payments and a consumer spending product launching in 40+ countries.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces around $80K as Iran strike unsettles crypto, risk assets
item.description: Bitcoin faced new volatility and a new struggle to reclaim $80,000 as Iran events added pressure to crypto and risk assets.

item.title: JUST IN: The odds that Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation gets signed into law this year are now 64% — Polymarket 🇺🇸 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBYbWxmQk5PU25qSFF6NXFILVNlVF9YU094ZTQ0UTg5ME1WWDVuN2ZyRkstSlNwb2k4WjQxWXc0TDJZZXlfNnlGbEtveFJvaWlKSk1mWG5DOElfN2J0MFZ5RHMxb3RXeVk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: The odds that Bitc…

item.title: 'This Is Fine' Creator Says AI Startup Stole His Meme for Subway Ads
item.description: KC Green, who drew the iconic burning-dog comic in 2013, says Artisan used his artwork in a paid ad campaign without his knowledge—and told followers to vandalize it on sight.

item.title: Texas Residents Sue MARA Holdings Over Bitcoin Mining Noise
item.description: The new lawsuit targets MARA’s Granbury site as cryptocurrency mining companies pivot to providing AI infrastructure.

item.title: Prediction markets entering institutional era after first block trade — Bernstein
item.description: Institutional investors are entering prediction markets as block trades, custom contracts and US regulatory shifts reshape a sector still dominated by retail users.

item.title: SEC Delays Rollout of ETFs Tied to Prediction Markets: Reuters
item.description: The SEC extended its review period for ETFs that would have tracked prediction market odds on political races and economic indicators.

item.title: 🚨 Important Point: Bitcoin Let me remind you again, like I said two months ago. Bitcoin has NEVER had its FULL, complete bull market EVER while the PMI was below 50 the whole time. It's wild that people honestly think Bitcoin will correct 50% from here... It's - x.com

item.title: Ethereum holders are back in profit as ETH price chart targets $3K
item.description: Ethereum investors are no longer in the red, increasing the chances of a rally to $3,000, but resistance at $2,800 may delay recovery.

item.title: The government should promote innovation, not punish it
item.description: District Attorney of Sacramento County, Ho argues that ambiguous rules and enforcement practices, such as those for crypto, lead to confusion, rather than seeking clarity in the law to further growth.

item.title: Did you know? Only 19% of crypto developers are located in the U.S. — down 51% in recent years. In order to bring those builders back and make the U.S. the crypto capital of the world, software developer protections are essential. With input from the crypto c - x.com

item.title: The strongest security posture in crypto is a shared one. A threat actor who fails a background check at one company will apply to three more that same week. Without shared intelligence, every company starts from zero. Ripple is now contributing exclusive DP - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1iWjNCcXNJM2hBeDBZTVg1WkkxYktPOHhLVkhRU3hrMlAwS0c5SkpzQTZGWEZZZVU1ZV9uNUFxR2hyVF9KamY2ZmxfSk1HQVZNTHlqVlZMX25tNkE?oc=5" target="_blank">The strongest security posture in crypto is…

item.title: Shopify and National Bank of Canada are among backers of a new digital currency built to settle trades 24/7
item.description: Tetra Trust's new stablecoin, CADD, is aimed at institutional use for 24/7 cross-border settlement, real-time corporate treasury, and direct fintech transfers, replacing legacy batch systems.

item.title: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard
item.description: DTCC, the infrastructure giant managing $114 trillion in securities, will begin tokenizing Russell 1000 stocks and Treasuries.

item.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
item.description: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.

item.title: BitMine Buys $240 Million in Ethereum as Tom Lee Heralds Arrival of 'Crypto Spring'
item.description: Tom Lee's BitMine Immersion Technologies made its third straight weekly Ethereum buy above 100K ETH as the coin continues rising.

item.title: Wall Street giant DTCC plans tokenized securities platform with July pilot, October launch
item.description: Clearing giant's move toward live tokenization market adds weight to Wall Street's blockchain push.

item.title: K Wave Media abandons Bitcoin treasury push for AI infrastructure
item.description: K Wave Media is redirecting up to $485 million from a Bitcoin treasury strategy into AI infrastructure, alongside debt reduction and restructuring, per a Form 6-K filing.
